provenance.environment: validation/apriori_prediction.py (real run; model_api simulate vs nstem_leaf)

result.finding: validation/apriori_prediction.py: redistributed-shoot model (nstem_leaf, N stem segments + retention) lowers the a-priori OOS log10 RMSE 0.987 -> 0.951 (same monotone f_xy + drivers) -- MARGINAL. Short-chain straw improves but long-chain straw/grain still collapse (PFDoDA straw 0.35 vs 49.75); needs hysteretic high-B sorption (docs/nstem_gradient_exploration.md). Predictive claim remains refuted.
